_instructions: Copy this file to configs/{machine_id}.json. Fill in every field. The Pi reads this at startup via config.py.

camera.notes: Mount camera level with the user's elbow at mid-rep

engagement_zone._how_to_set: Open pose/label.html, load a video, press B, draw a box around the seat+machine area. The tool copies the normalised coords to clipboard.

weight_stack._how_to_set: Adjust until the ROI tightly wraps the weight stack plates in the camera view. Set SHOW_PREVIEW=True in config.py to see overlay.

rep_detection._notes: Adjust thresholds per machine. See pi/config.py for full list.

onnx_model._how_to_set: After training, scp the .onnx here: /home/pi/xlf/models/activity_v1.onnx then set path above.
